name: /doctor token-cost report includes a per-skill context-cost line for every skill in the active profile
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/skills && printf '{"skill":"flow-guard","tokens":1200}\n{"skill":"profile-suggest","tokens":800}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/skills/cost-stats.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --report token-cost --by skill 2>out.txt && grep -q 'skill=flow-guard tokens=1200' out.txt && grep -q 'skill=profile-suggest tokens=800' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
